title: Death and Rebirth Trailer
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by Nukie » Thu Oct 12, 2006 6:16 pm I was looking at a trailer for Death and Rebirth, and I heard Asuka deliver the "I'll kill you!" lines very differently, yet Rebirth ends before this scene occurs. Did I miss something? There also very familiar lines by Maya, Fuyutski, Gendo...everyone, but they sound a bit different. here's the trailer: http://youtube.com/watch?v=w_OvSqC6fw8

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Fri Oct 13, 2006 8:35 am Nukie wrote: I was looking at a trailer for Death and Rebirth, and I heard Asuka deliver the "I'll kill you!" lines very differently, yet Rebirth ends before this scene occurs. Did I miss something? There also very familiar lines by Maya, Fuyutski, Gendo...everyone, but they sound a bit different. here's the trailer: http://youtube.com/watch?v=w_OvSqC6fw8

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Fri Oct 13, 2006 10:09 am I love that trailer. Behind schedule but the fans are screaming for more? No problem! Just throw together some of your production sketches, have the VAs do (very) rough takes of some of their lines, put in some recycled series footage tinted red, then add a few dashes of flashing text and random microscopic images*, and serve with epic Verdi score. Guranteed to be a hit! It even has Eva-01's growl from episode 02 at the end there. I've always found that one interesting, it actually sounds rather "cute" as far as Eva vocalizations go. *Dang, I had screencaps of some of these, but I lost them... Very funky-looking stuff, much like you find in the "flashing image" sequences in the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Oct 13, 2006 11:41 am That trailer is batshit crazy. Rapidly-flashing images, text (even screens full of it), animation, totally random and enigmatic voiceovers. It would be a total bitch to decisively dissect it. It doesn't help that the trailer was never remastered, so it's interlaced to hell on the Renewal DVD. Screencaps? Later, perhaps.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Oct 14, 2006 2:04 am The interlacing is so bad on the trailer (and it doesn't even seem to have enough frames to match the original film, too!) that some of these shots are only partially visible (like, a horizontal slice), interlaced, for single frames. At least the D&R deluxe program book used two of its pages to represent the majority of the trailer with stills (albeit printed on funky paper that didn't scan too well). So, what the hell are these things? TEST... YOUR MIGHT! #1 http://www.evacommentary.org/death/d&r_preview_C095.jpg http://www.evacommentary.org/death/d&r_preview_C095_scan.jpg #2 http://www.evacommentary.org/death/d&r_preview_C096.jpg #3 http://www.evacommentary.org/death/d&r_preview_C101.jpg http://www.evacommentary.org/death/d&r_preview_C101_scan.jpg Must... eat... brains! #4 http://www.evacommentary.org/death/d&r_preview_C103.jpg http://www.evacommentary.org/death/d&r_preview_C103_scan.jpg Smooth muscle tissue? #5 http://www.evacommentary.org/death/d&r_preview_C106.jpg http://www.evacommentary.org/death/d&r_preview_C106_scan.jpg Looks like a cross-section. #6 http://www.evacommentary.org/death/d&r_preview_C109.jpg #7 http://www.evacommentary.org/death/d&r_preview_C110_scan.jpg #8 http://www.evacommentary.org/death/d&r_preview_C114.jpg Omelette, anyone? #9 http://www.evacommentary.org/death/d&r_preview_C117_scan.jpg And here in the Produce Department...

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Oct 14, 2006 4:36 am 1 kinda looks like some type of coral 5 blood vessels?

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Sat Oct 14, 2006 12:03 pm Still have no idea on 1, that one's puzzled me since I first saw it. No clue on 2. 3 could very well be brain matter, or some other kind of tissue. 4 might be smooth muscle tissue as you said, I'm not sure. 5's definitely a cross section of arteries, possibly in some kind of fatty tissue. 6... I can't shake this vague feeling that I've seen an image like this before in a biology textbook, and that it had something to do with hormones. Don't know about 7... the patterns almost make it look like a shell of some sort. 8's another one that's puzzled me. IO mean, there are a few things that it sort of looks like, but nothing I can think of that really fits. 9 almost looks like a raw steak or something. :p Gah, my computer's prompting me to reboot because of those annoying "Windows Updates" that it always has to install without asking for my permission first. Later.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Oct 14, 2006 1:40 pm Ornette wrote: 1 kinda looks like some type of coral

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 16, 2006 7:47 pm I love that trailer; I think it's so cool how Asuka's lines are delivered differently (than in the movie), makes it all the more dramatic. I also thought it was cool how Shinji's lines started out with that lil "I'm worthless" speech he gave to Misato, but ended up with him saying what he said at Rebirth/EoE's start: "Help me. Help me, Asuka..." :P ...Yes, I'm a geek. ^^; (Unlike nerds, I have somewhat of a social life, damn it! )

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Mon Oct 16, 2006 11:37 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: (Unlike nerds, I have somewhat of a social life, damn it! )
